changes.value:
## What
Copy the `parser/` module from `vendor/sem/crates/sem-core/src/parser/` into `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/parser/`. Also copy `utils/` (hash helpers). This is the bulk of the code (~3,800 lines) including tree-sitter entity extraction for 12+ languages.

Files to copy:
- `parser/mod.rs`
- `parser/plugin.rs` (SemanticParserPlugin trait)
- `parser/registry.rs` (ParserRegistry)
- `parser/differ.rs` (compute_semantic_diff, DiffResult)
- `parser/graph.rs` (EntityGraph — may not be used but is referenced internally)
- `parser/plugins/mod.rs` (create_default_registry)
- `parser/plugins/code/mod.rs` (CodeParserPlugin with thread-local TS cache)
- `parser/plugins/code/entity_extractor.rs`
- `parser/plugins/code/languages.rs`
- `parser/plugins/json.rs`, `yaml.rs`, `toml_plugin.rs`, `csv_plugin.rs`, `markdown.rs`, `vue.rs`, `fallback.rs`
- `utils/mod.rs`, `utils/hash.rs`

Remove any `use git2` references from differ.rs (it only uses FileChange which is a plain struct in git::types — we'll re-export FileChange from a git_types module instead).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::parser::differ::compute_semantic_diff` compiles
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::parser::plugins::create_default_registry` compiles
- [ ] All language plugins register correctly
- [ ] No git2 imports anywhere in the crate

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-sem` passes
- [ ] Existing parser unit tests from sem-core pass
SEM-2: Harvest parser/ module (plugins, differ, registry)
